feed.title: Google Cloud: Cloud Shell
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Cloud Shell

entry.content: Cloud Shell no longer includes the Terraform CLI by default. Users can customize their environment to install the CLI on environment startup, or install the binary to their home directory to persist the install between sessions.
entry.summary: The Terraform CLI is no longer included by default in Cloud Shell. Users can customize their environment to install it on startup or install the binary to their home directory for persistence between sessions.
entry.title: Change: Terraform CLI no longer default in Cloud Shell

entry.content: The Cloud Shell Editor is built with Code OSS for Cloud Shell 1.108.2
entry.summary: The Cloud Shell Editor has been updated to version 1.108.2, built with Code OSS. This update enhances the development experience within Cloud Shell.
entry.title: Change: Cloud Shell Editor Update
